changes.comment: sdk-ui-charts: Improve screen reader aria-label accuracy for heatmap (row dimension, correct attribute name, proper number format), radar (attribute prefix), treemap (correct dimension order and labels for both flat and segmented), and stacked bar/column charts (consistent measure formatting). Add keyboard navigation for stacked column/bar totals: the stack label is now reachable with Up/Down arrows alongside individual segments, with correct visual focus management and same-column navigation that bypasses Highcharts' geometry-based heuristic.
